{{Quote|Why pick on me? People wouldn't come to me if the banks and credit kiosks treated them fairly. I just help people out for a fair price.|Sires Vant|<ref name="GG11" />}}
'''Sires Vant''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] loanshark and member of [[Valis Lorn]]'s organization during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Vant was based on [[Andasala]] and controlled much of the underworld money-lending on the planet.
